src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/Application.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group third-party imports before local project imports.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Asyn.general_idea: Remove unused wildcard and redundant imports to clean up the file.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cach.general_idea: Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Ehcache configuration builders to improve code clarity.
Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for Spring context annotations.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Cons.general_idea: Add a constant for email validation regex pattern.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Data.general_idea: Remove imports for classes that are no longer used in the file, such as Mongobee, MongoClient, and Elasticsearch config.
Remove the unused SLF4J logger field and its associated imports.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove the Jackson module for serializing RFC7807 Problem objects from the Zalando library.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.human_impl: Removed import of org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule and the corresponding @Bean method problemModule().

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.general_idea: Remove the Jackson module for serializing ConstraintViolationProblem objects from the Zalando library.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Jack.human_impl: Removed import of org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule and the corresponding @Bean method constraintViolationProblemModule().

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.general_idea: Replace the JHipster-specific AngularCookieLocaleResolver with the standard Spring CookieLocaleResolver to decouple from JHipster utilities and align with standard Spring Boot configuration.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.human_impl: new CookieLocaleResolver() instead of new AngularCookieLocaleResolver()

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Loca.general_idea: Explicitly set the default locale to English on the CookieLocaleResolver to ensure consistent behavior across environments.
Replace wildcard imports with specific imports and add necessary standard library imports for the new configuration.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.general_idea: Replace wildcard imports with explicit specific imports for Spring annotations to improve code clarity.
Reorder imports to group standard library/Spring imports before project-specific imports.
src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.human_impl: Moved io.jojoaddison and tech.jhipster imports below org.springframework imports.

src/main/java/io/jojoaddison/config/Logg.general_idea: Replace dynamic Logstash queue size configuration with a hardcoded default value.
